name: generate_image
description: Generate high-fidelity advertising, packaging, or brand visuals using Vidtory BAPI (gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview). Supports aspect ratios, reference images, and local soulId models.

prompt.description: Detailed text prompt describing the image concept, style, colors, and layout.

refImageUrl.description: Local file path or URL of reference image to preserve structure/content.

soulId.description: Local character name (e.g. model_asian_lily) to preserve face consistency.

name: generate_video
description: Generate dynamic unboxing, fashion catwalk, or transition advertising videos via Vidtory BAPI (veo-3.1-fast-generate-001).

prompt.description: Detailed physical motion and descriptive prompt for the video.

duration.description: Video duration in seconds. Max 5 seconds. Defaults to 5.

refImageUrl.description: Local file path or URL of the start keyframe reference image.

refImageEndUrl.description: Local file path or URL of the end keyframe reference image to interpolate between.

soulId.description: Local character name (e.g. model_asian_lily) to preserve face consistency.

name: generate_audio
description: Synthesize natural text-to-speech (TTS) voiceover using Vidtory BAPI (eleven_v3), optimized for Vietnamese and English.

prompt.description: Text script to read out. For Vietnamese, speed is estimated at 2.5 words per second.

voiceId.description: ElevenLabs voice ID (e.g. Ngan: a3AkyqGG4v8Pg7SWQ0Y3, Tuan: 9EE00wK5qV6tPtpQIxvy).

name: voices_list
description: List all supported voiceover actors and speakers on Vidtory BAPI, filtered by language.

language.description: Two-letter language code (e.g., 'vi' for Vietnamese, 'en' for English).

name: character_create
description: Register and save a new AI character model locally to be used for Face-ID consistency with soulId.

name.description: Unique identifier name for the character (e.g., 'lily').

image.description: Local file path or URL of the high-quality portrait reference image.

prompt.description: Descriptive text representing the physical appearance of the model.

name: character_list
description: List all locally registered character models saved in the database.
